name: Goober World
author: Poki
description: Goober World is a platform game where you play as a goober on an adventurous journey. Run, jump, dash, and avoid sharp and deadly floors and gears. With tons of unique levels, each one challenges you to navigate obstacles and reach the destination. Unlock and customize many cute goober characters with unique looks. Are you ready to dive into the whimsical fun of Goober World? How to play Goober World? Run: A,D, or left and right arrow keys Jump: W, Z, or up arrow key Dash: hold X or the space bar Who created Goober World? Goober World is created by Winterpixel Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Goober World for free? You can play Goober World for free on Poki. Can I play Goober World on mobile devices and desktop? Goober World can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
